emails.subject: Mr. Sud
emails.body: Rebecca, I share some of your concerns regarding Mr. Sud. He is retired and he chose to contact us rather indirectly (or on the spur of the moment). I understand that things are done differently in different cultures but I did not meet him and could not form my judgment based on personal observations. However, the information he gave us seems to be too important not to convey to you and not to act upon. Vince Kaminski

emails.subject: RE: Mr. Sud
emails.body: RE: Mr. Sud Vince, It never hurts or rarely, anyway) to follow up on things. i met with him on Saturday. It will be interesting to see what he does. I didn't empower him to do anything on our behalf and basically just stated what I wouldn't mind him repeating. Thanks, Rebecca
